unique_vulnerabilities.name: Arbitrary ETH Transfer in sendTo()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings reference the ability to send ETH to an arbitrary address without proper validation, including missing zero-checks.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Dependence on tx.origin in sendTo()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of tx.origin for authorization, which is insecure and can lead to vulnerabilities.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings point to the use of an outdated Solidity version with known issues.
